name: send_whatsapp_message
description: Send a WhatsApp message to a phone number using the Vonage Messages API. Supports text messages through the WhatsApp Business channel. Requires a WhatsApp-enabled Vonage number or an approved WhatsApp Business Account linked to your Vonage application. Messages outside the 24-hour customer service window must use approved message templates.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The recipient WhatsApp number in E.164 format (e.g., '14155550123'). The recipient must have WhatsApp installed.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Your WhatsApp Business number in E.164 format. Must be registered and approved with WhatsApp Business API through Vonage.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: The messaging channel. Must be 'whatsapp' for WhatsApp messages.

parameters.name: message_type
parameters.description: The type of message. Use 'text' for plain text, 'image' for images, 'template' for pre-approved template messages.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The message body text. Required when message_type is 'text'. Maximum 4096 characters.

parameters.name: template
parameters.description: Template object when message_type is 'template'. Contains 'name' (template name) and 'parameters' array for variable substitution.

body.text: Hi Sarah, your appointment is confirmed for March 3 at 2:00 PM. Reply CANCEL to cancel.
